# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for our complete application stack (VPC, EC2, RDS, S3, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure components. We'll add CloudWatch alarms and detailed monitoring after we deploy and verify the basic setup works.

Write secure code.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: '10.0.0.0/16'
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true

  Subnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: '10.0.1.0/24'

  RDSInstance:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBInstance
    Properties:
      DBInstanceClass: db.t2.micro
      Engine: postgres
      MasterUsername: myuser
      MasterUserPassword: !Sub 'password'
      VPCSecurityGroups:
        - !GetAtt 'SG.GroupID'

  SG:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: RDS Security Group
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: RDS-SG

  EC2Instance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      ImageId: ami-abc123
      InstanceType: t2.micro
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SubnetId: !Ref Subnet
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !GetAtt 'SG.GroupID'

  S3Bucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket

  LoadBalancer:
    Type: AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::LoadBalancer
    Properties:
      Name: my-lb
      Subnets:
        - !Ref Subnet
      SecurityGroups:
        - !GetAtt 'SG.GroupID'

Outputs:
  VPCId: !Ref VPC
  RDSInstanceId: !Ref RDSInstance
  S3BucketName: !Ref S3Bucket
